title: phyllanthus st-johnii
intro: Phyllanthus st-johnii, also known as Airy Shaw's Phyllanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Phyllanthus st-johnii include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin diseases, as well as its ability to support liver health and boost the immune system. In traditional medicine, Phyllanthus st-johnii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various health issues.
